message:
test: VCR-based E2E CLI print mode + stdin piping tests (bd-1ub)

Replace MockHttpServer approach (blocked by asupersync TcpStream hang)
with VCR playback for deterministic E2E print mode testing. Three tests:
roundtrip, stdin pipe, and @file reference expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
